title: Login page renders correctly for unauthenticated users
description: Verify the /login page renders the login form with all required elements for unauthenticated visitors.

steps.description: Verify the page contains a login form with email and password fields
Verify Google OAuth login button is present

title: Register page renders correctly for unauthenticated users
description: Verify the /register page renders the registration form with all required fields.

steps.description: Verify the page contains a registration form with name, email, phone, location, skills and password fields

title: Unauthenticated user is redirected from student dashboard
description: Verify unauthenticated access to /student/dashboard is blocked and redirects to login.

steps.description: Navigate to /student/dashboard without any session cookie
Verify the response is a 302 redirect
Verify the Location header points to /login or an auth page

title: Unauthenticated user is redirected from admin dashboard
description: Verify unauthenticated access to /admin/dashboard is blocked and redirects to login.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/dashboard without any session cookie
Verify the response is a 302 redirect
Verify the Location header points to /login or an auth page

title: Google OAuth login redirects to Google consent screen
description: Verify that GET /google/login redirects to accounts.google.com consent screen.

steps.description: Verify the response is a 302 redirect
Verify the Location header contains accounts.google.com

title: Invalid Google OAuth code redirects to login with error
description: Verify that /google/callback with an invalid code does not create a session and redirects to /login.

steps.description: Verify the response is not a 200 OK (should be redirect or error)
Verify the user remains unauthenticated and is redirected to login

title: Student dashboard renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the student dashboard loads correctly after login using the test helper endpoint.

steps.description: Call GET /test/login-student to establish authenticated session
Verify the page contains dashboard content including career workspace elements

title: Admin dashboard renders for authenticated admin
description: Verify the admin dashboard loads correctly after admin login using the test helper endpoint.

steps.description: Call GET /test/login-admin to establish authenticated admin session
Verify the page contains admin management content

title: Root route redirects authenticated student to student dashboard
description: Verify that / redirects an authenticated student to /student/dashboard or equivalent.

steps.description: Verify the final page is the student dashboard with 200 OK

title: Root route redirects authenticated admin to admin dashboard
description: Verify that / redirects an authenticated admin to /admin/dashboard.

steps.description: Call GET /test/login-admin to login as admin
Verify the final page is the admin dashboard with 200 OK
Verify admin dashboard content is visible

title: Jobs page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /jobs page (campus drive jobs) loads with job listings for an authenticated student.

steps.description: Verify the page contains job listing content

title: Explore Jobs page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /explore-jobs page (live jobs from API) loads for an authenticated student.

steps.description: Verify the page contains live job listings

title: Internships page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /internships page loads with internship listings for an authenticated student.

steps.description: Verify the page contains internship listings

title: Profile page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /profile page loads and shows the student's profile information.

steps.description: Verify the page contains profile form or student information

title: Applications page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /applications page shows the student's job application pipeline.

steps.description: Verify the page contains application tracking content

title: Messages page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /messages page loads and shows inbox messages for an authenticated student.

steps.description: Verify the page contains message inbox content

title: Calendar page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /calendar page loads with placement event calendar for an authenticated student.

steps.description: Verify the page contains calendar/event content

title: Companies page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /companies page loads and shows company listings for an authenticated student.

steps.description: Verify the page contains company listing content

title: Settings page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /settings page loads and shows user settings options for an authenticated student.

steps.description: Verify the page contains settings/preferences content

title: Saved Jobs page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /saved-jobs page loads and shows bookmarked jobs for an authenticated student.

steps.description: Verify the page contains saved/bookmarked jobs content

title: Bookmarked News page renders for authenticated student
description: Verify the /bookmarked-news page loads for an authenticated student.

steps.description: Verify the page contains bookmarked news content

title: Forgot Password page renders correctly
description: Verify the /forgot-password page renders with the password reset form.

steps.description: Verify the page contains a forgot password form with email input

title: Logout endpoint clears session
description: Verify that GET /logout clears the user session and redirects to login.

steps.description: Verify access is denied and redirected to login again

title: Admin can view student list
description: Verify that the admin dashboard includes access to the student list/management section.

steps.description: Call GET /test/login-admin to login as admin
Verify admin dashboard contains student management or statistics section

title: API calendar events endpoint returns JSON for authenticated student
description: Verify that /api/calendar/events returns valid JSON for an authenticated student.

steps.description: Verify the response Content-Type is application/json
